name: Sabrina
overview: When a doctor receives her namesake as an abused and injured patient, she is instantly invested in the latter's story and is determined to bring her justice. Sabrina is the heart-wrenching saga of one woman stepping up for another woman and a tale of universal womanhood.

trailers.title: Sabrina (সাবরিনা) - Trailer|Ashfaque Nipun | Mehazabien Chowdhury, Nazia Haque Orsha|25 Mar| hoichoi
